title: rubus × rothomagensis
intro: Rubus × rothomagensis, also known as the hybrid bramble, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high anthocyanin content, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × rothomagensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. Rubus × rothomagensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and is also used in culinary applications, including jams and preserves.
